posts.author: Bob_Sacamano
posts.title:
NATO’s Rutte explains calling Trump “Daddy”

“It’s a language problem. In Dutch, ‘your father’ translates to ‘daddy.’ I said sometimes daddy has to be angry… I was not calling him my daddy!”

twitter.content:
⬇️NATO’s Rutte explains calling Trump “Daddy”

“It’s a language problem. In Dutch, ‘your father’ translates to ‘daddy.’ I said sometimes daddy has to be angry… I was not calling him my daddy!”

SO FUNNY 😜
